name: dubwool
flavor_texts: Weave a carpet from its springy wool, and you end up with something closer to a trampoline. You’ll start to bounce the moment you set foot on it.
Its majestic horns are meant only to impress the opposite gender. They never see use in battle.
text: Dubwool is the Sheep Pokémon. It is a normal-type Pokémon. Abilities: fluffy, steadfast, bulletproof (hidden). Base stats — HP: 72, Attack: 80, Defense: 100, Sp. Atk: 60, Sp. Def: 90, Speed: 88. Evolution line: wooloo → dubwool. Lore: Weave a carpet from its springy wool, and you end up with something closer to a trampoline. You’ll start to bounce the moment you set foot on it. Its majestic horns are meant only to impress the opposite gender. They never see use in battle.
